{"body":"### Preflight Checklist

- [x] I have searched [existing issues](https://github.com/moltisorg/moltis/issues?q=is%3Aissue+label%3Abug) and this hasn't been reported yet
- [x] I am using the latest version of Moltis
- [ ] If this happened during a chat session, I included as much full session context as possible and redacted secrets

### What happened?

Wrong join address in node join - original docker port gets added

### Expected behavior

expected to see ws://example.com/ws

### Steps to reproduce

deployed with following compose file:
```
services:
  moltis:
    image: ghcr.io/moltis-org/moltis:0.10.18
    container_name: moltis
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      - MOLTIS_BEHIND_PROXY=true
      - MOLTIS_NO_TLS=true
    networks:
      - mainnet
    expose:
      - "13131"

    volumes:
      - moltis_data:/home/moltis/.moltis
      - moltis_config:/home/moltis/.config/moltis
      - /dev/null:/var/run/docker.sock
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "curl", "-f", "http://localhost:13131/health"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 3

volumes:
  moltis_data:
  moltis_config:
```

Pointed caddy (simple reverse_proxy block):
```
http://example.com { reverse_proxy http://moltis.docker:13131 }
```
(yes, no TLS for now, it's LAN)

Open settings -> nodes and i see ws://example.com:13131/ws address as address to join, instead of ws://example.com/ws as expected.

### Did this happen during a chat session?

None

```markdown

```

```shell

```

### Is this a regression?

I don't know

Gateway / Web UI

Docker

Ubuntu / Debian

content.text:
## Issue #426: Wrong address in nodes

**Problem:** When Moltis runs behind a reverse proxy (Caddy), the "Nodes" settings page shows the join address as `ws://example.com:13131/ws` instead of `ws://example.com/ws`. The internal Docker port (13131) leaks into the externally-visible join URL, even though `MOLTIS_BEHIND_PROXY=true` is set.

The user confirmed this also happens with proper HTTPS termination.

Let me find the relevant code that builds this join address.

input.prompt:
Find the code responsible for generating/constructing the WebSocket join URL for the "nodes" feature in this Moltis project. The bug is that the join address shows `ws://example.com:13131/ws` instead of `ws://example.com/ws` when behind a reverse proxy.

Search for:
1. Where the node join URL / join address is constructed (likely in Rust code)
2. How the port gets included in this URL
3. How `MOLTIS_BEHIND_PROXY` is used
4. Any "gon" data related to nodes that might pass this URL to the frontend
5. The frontend code that displays the join address in the nodes/settings page

Be very thorough - check server.rs, any nodes-related modules, gon data construction, and the JS/HTML for the nodes UI.

    98→pub(crate) struct MemSnapshot {
    99→    process: u64,
   100→    #[serde(skip_serializing_if = "Option::is_none")]
   101→    local_llama_cpp: Option<u64>,
   102→    available: u64,
   103→    total: u64,
   104→}
   105→
   106→/// Collect a point-in-time memory snapshot (process RSS + local llama.cpp +
   107→/// system memory).
   108→pub(crate) fn collect_mem_snapshot() -> MemSnapshot {
   109→    let mut sys = sysinfo::System::new();
   110→    sys.refresh_memory();
   111→    let pid = sysinfo::get_current_pid().ok();
   112→    if let Some(pid) = pid {
   113→        sys.refresh_processes_specifics(
   114→            sysinfo::ProcessesToUpdate::Some(&[pid]),
   115→            false,
   116→            sysinfo::ProcessRefreshKind::nothing().with_memory(),
   117→        );
   118→    }
   119→    let process = pid
   120→        .and_then(|p| sys.process(p))
   121→        .map(|p| p.memory())
   122→        .unwrap_or(0);
   123→    let local_llama_cpp = moltis_gateway::server::local_llama_cpp_bytes_for_ui();
   124→    let total = sys.total_memory();
   125→    // available_memory() returns 0 on macOS; fall back to total − used.
   126→    let available = match sys.available_memory() {
   127→        0 => total.saturating_sub(sys.used_memory()),
   128→        v => v,
   129→    };
   130→    MemSnapshot {
   131→        process,
   132→        local_llama_cpp: (local_llama_cpp > 0).then_some(local_llama_cpp),
   133→        available,
   134→        total,
   135→    }
   136→}

   142→    BRANCH

   145→            let head = repo.head().ok()?;
   146→            let branch = head.referent_name()?.shorten().to_string();

   148→        })

   150→}

   152→fn parse_git_branch(raw: &str) -> Option<String> {
   153→    let branch = raw.trim();
   154→    if branch.is_empty() || branch == "main" || branch == "master" {
   155→        None
   156→    } else {
   157→        Some(branch.to_owned())
   158→    }
   159→}

   163→fn truncate_preview(text: &str, max_chars: usize) -> String {

   177→}

   179→async fn build_recent_sessions_snapshot(gw: &GatewayState, limit: usize) -> Vec<serde_json::Value> {

   181→        return Vec::new();
   182→    };

   184→    let mut recent = Vec::new();

   274→                let mut names: HashSet<&str> = HashSet::new();
   275→                for m in arr {
   276→                    if let Some(p) = m.get("provider").and_then(|p| p.as_str()) {
   277→                        names.insert(p);
   278→                    }
   279→                }
   280→                names.len()
   281→            })
   282→        })
   283→        .unwrap_or(0);
   284→
   285→    let channels = channels
   286→        .ok()
   287→        .and_then(|v| {
   288→            v.get("channels")
   289→                .and_then(|c| c.as_array())
   290→                .map(|a| a.len())
   291→        })
   292→        .unwrap_or(0);
   293→
   294→    let mut skills = 0usize;
   295→    if let Ok(path) = moltis_skills::manifest::ManifestStore::default_path() {
   296→        let store = moltis_skills::manifest::ManifestStore::new(path);
   297→        if let Ok(m) = store.load() {
   298→            skills = m
   299→                .repos
   300→                .iter()
   301→                .flat_map(|r| &r.skills)
   302→                .filter(|s| s.enabled)
   303→                .count();
   304→        }
   305→    }
   306→
   307→    let mcp = mcp
   308→        .ok()
   309→        .and_then(|v| {
   310→            v.as_array().map(|arr| {
   311→                arr.iter()
   312→                    .filter(|s| s.get("state").and_then(|s| s.as_str()) == Some("running"))
   313→                    .count()
   314→            })
   315→        })
   316→        .unwrap_or(0);
   317→
   318→    let crons = crons
   319→        .ok()
   320→        .and_then(|v| {
   321→            v.as_array().map(|arr| {
   322→                arr.iter()
   323→                    .filter(|j| {
   324→                        let enabled = j.get("enabled").and_then(|e| e.as_bool()).unwrap_or(false);
   325→                        let system = j.get("system").and_then(|s| s.as_bool()).unwrap_or(false);
   326→                        enabled && !system
   327→                    })
   328→                    .count()
   329→            })
   330→        })
   331→        .unwrap_or(0);
   332→
   333→    let hooks = gw.inner.read().await.discovered_hooks.len();
   334→
   335→    NavCounts {
   336→        projects,
   337→        providers,
   338→        channels,
   339→        skills,
   340→        mcp,
   341→        crons,
   342→        hooks,
   343→    }
   344→}

   348→pub(crate) async fn build_gon_data(gw: &GatewayState) -> GonData {
   349→    const GON_SESSIONS_RECENT_LIMIT: usize = 30;
   350→
   351→    let port = gw.port;
   352→    let identity = gw
   353→        .services
   354→        .onboarding
   355→        .identity_get()
   356→        .await
   357→        .ok()
   358→        .and_then(|v| serde_json::from_value(v).ok())
   359→        .unwrap_or_default();
   360→
   361→    let counts = build_nav_counts(gw).await;
   362→    let (crons, cron_status) = tokio::join!(gw.services.cron.list(), gw.services.cron.status());
   363→    let crons: Vec<moltis_cron::types::CronJob> = crons
   364→        .ok()
   365→        .and_then(|v| serde_json::from_value(v).ok())
   366→        .unwrap_or_default();
   367→    let cron_status: moltis_cron::types::CronStatus = cron_status
   368→        .ok()
   369→        .and_then(|v| serde_json::from_value(v).ok())
   370→        .unwrap_or_default();
   371→    let (heartbeat_config, channels_offered) = {
   372→        let inner = gw.inner.read().await;
   373→        (
   374→            inner.heartbeat_config.clone(),
   375→            inner.channels_offered.clone(),
   376→        )
   377→    };
   378→    let channel_descriptors: Vec<moltis_channels::ChannelDescriptor> = channels_offered
   379→        .iter()
   380→        .filter_map(|s| s.parse::<moltis_channels::ChannelType>().ok())
   381→        .map(|ct| ct.descriptor())
   382→        .collect();
   383→
   384→    let heartbeat_runs: Vec<moltis_cron::types::CronRunRecord> = gw
   385→        .services
   386→        .cron
   387→        .runs(serde_json::json!({ "id": "__heartbeat__", "limit": 10 }))
   388→        .await
   389→        .ok()
   390→        .and_then(|v| serde_json::from_value(v).ok())
   391→        .unwrap_or_default();
   392→
   393→    let sandbox = if let Some(ref router) = gw.sandbox_router {
   394→        SandboxGonInfo {
   395→            backend: router.backend_name().to_owned(),
   396→            os: std::env::consts::OS,
   397→            default_image: router.default_image().await,
   398→            image_building: router
   399→                .building_flag
   400→                .load(std::sync::atomic::Ordering::Relaxed),
   401→        }
   402→    } else {
   403→        SandboxGonInfo {
   404→            backend: "none".to_owned(),
   405→            os: std::env::consts::OS,
   406→            default_image: moltis_tools::sandbox::DEFAULT_SANDBOX_IMAGE.to_owned(),
   407→            image_building: false,
   408→        }
   409→    };
   410→
   411→    // Fetch agent personas for the gon data.
   412→    let agents: Vec<serde_json::Value> = if let Some(ref store) = gw.services.agent_persona_store {
   413→        store
   414→            .list()
   415→            .await
   416→            .ok()
   417→            .map(|list| {
   418→                list.into_iter()
   419→                    .map(|a| serde_json::to_value(a).unwrap_or_default())
   420→                    .collect()
   421→            })
   422→            .unwrap_or_default()
   423→    } else {
   424→        Vec::new()
   425→    };
   426→
   427→    let sessions_recent = build_recent_sessions_snapshot(gw, GON_SESSIONS_RECENT_LIMIT).await;
   428→
   429→    GonData {
   430→        identity,
   431→        version: gw.version.clone(),
   432→        port,
   433→        counts,
   434→        crons,
   435→        cron_status,
   436→        heartbeat_config,
   437→        heartbeat_runs,
   438→        voice_enabled: cfg!(feature = "voice"),
   439→        graphql_enabled: cfg!(feature = "graphql"),
   440→        git_branch: detect_git_branch(),
   441→        mem: collect_mem_snapshot(),
   442→        deploy_platform: gw.deploy_platform.clone(),
   443→        channels_offered,
   444→        channel_descriptors,
   445→        update: gw.inner.read().await.update.clone(),
   446→        sandbox,
   447→        routes: SPA_ROUTES.clone(),
   448→        started_at: *PROCESS_STARTED_AT_MS,
   449→        openclaw_detected: moltis_gateway::server::openclaw_detected_for_ui(),
   450→        sessions_recent,
   451→        agents,
   452→        #[cfg(feature = "vault")]
   453→        vault_status: {
   454→            if let Some(ref vault) = gw.vault {
   455→                match vault.status().await {
   456→                    Ok(s) => format!("{s:?}").to_lowercase(),
   457→                    Err(_) => "error".to_owned(),
   458→                }
   459→            } else {
   460→                "disabled".to_owned()
   461→            }
   462→        },
   463→    }
   464→}

   548→pub(crate) fn script_safe_json<T: serde::Serialize>(value: &T) -> String {
   549→    let json = match serde_json::to_string(value) {
   550→        Ok(json) => json,
   551→        Err(e) => {
   552→            warn!(error = %e, "failed to serialize gon data for html template");
   553→            "{}".to_owned()
   554→        },
   555→    };
   556→    json.replace('<', "\\u003c")
   557→        .replace('>', "\\u003e")
   558→        .replace('&', "\\u0026")
   559→        .replace('\u{2028}', "\\u2028")
   560→        .replace('\u{2029}', "\\u2029")
   561→}

   602→pub(crate) async fn render_spa_template(
   603→    gateway: &GatewayState,
   604→    template: SpaTemplate,
   605→) -> axum::response::Response {
   606→    let (build_ts, asset_prefix) = if is_dev_assets() {
   607→        let ts = std::time::SystemTime::now()
   608→            .duration_since(std::time::UNIX_EPOCH)
   609→            .unwrap_or_default()
   610→            .as_millis();
   611→        ("dev".to_owned(), format!("/assets/v/{ts}/"))
   612→    } else {
   613→        static HASH: std::sync::LazyLock<String> = std::sync::LazyLock::new(asset_content_hash);
   614→        (HASH.to_string(), format!("/assets/v/{}/", *HASH))
   615→    };
   616→
   617→    let nonce = uuid::Uuid::new_v4().to_string();
   618→
   619→    // Resolve Shiki URL from config override or default CDN.
   620→    let shiki_url = gateway
   621→        .inner
   622→        .read()
   623→        .await
   624→        .shiki_cdn_url
   625→        .clone()
   626→        .unwrap_or_else(|| DEFAULT_SHIKI_CDN_URL.to_owned());
   627→
   628→    let body = match template {
   629→        SpaTemplate::Index => {
   630→            let gon = build_gon_data(gateway).await;
   631→            let share_meta = build_share_meta(&gon.identity);
   632→            let gon_json = script_safe_json(&gon);
   633→            let template = IndexHtmlTemplate {
   634→                build_ts: &build_ts,
   635→                asset_prefix: &asset_prefix,
   636→                nonce: &nonce,
   637→                gon_json: &gon_json,
   638→                share_title: &share_meta.title,
   639→                share_description: &share_meta.description,
   640→                share_site_name: &share_meta.site_name,
   641→                share_image_url: SHARE_IMAGE_URL,
   642→                share_image_alt: &share_meta.image_alt,
   643→                routes: &SPA_ROUTES,
   644→                shiki_url: &shiki_url,
   645→            };
   646→            match template.render() {
   647→                Ok(html) => html,
   648→                Err(e) => {
   649→                    warn!(error = %e, "failed to render index template");
   650→                    String::new()
   651→                },
   652→            }
   653→        },
   654→        SpaTemplate::Login => {
   655→            let gon = build_gon_data(gateway).await;
   656→            let gon_json = script_safe_json(&gon);
   657→            let page_title = identity_name(&gon.identity).to_owned();
   658→            let template = LoginHtmlTemplate {
   659→                build_ts: &build_ts,
   660→                asset_prefix: &asset_prefix,
   661→                nonce: &nonce,
   662→                page_title: &page_title,
   663→                gon_json: &gon_json,
   664→            };
   665→            match template.render() {
   666→                Ok(html) => html,
   667→                Err(e) => {
   668→                    warn!(error = %e, "failed to render login template");
   669→                    String::new()
   670→                },
   671→            }
   672→        },
   673→        SpaTemplate::Onboarding => {
   674→            let gon = build_gon_data(gateway).await;
   675→            let gon_json = script_safe_json(&gon);
   676→            let page_title = format!("{} onboarding", identity_name(&gon.identity));
   677→            let template = OnboardingHtmlTemplate {
   678→                build_ts: &build_ts,
   679→                asset_prefix: &asset_prefix,
   680→                nonce: &nonce,
   681→                page_title: &page_title,
   682→                gon_json: &gon_json,
   683→            };
   684→            match template.render() {
   685→                Ok(html) => html,
   686→                Err(e) => {
   687→                    warn!(error = %e, "failed to render onboarding template");
   688→                    String::new()
   689→                },
   690→            }
   691→        },
   692→        SpaTemplate::SetupRequired => {
   693→            let template = SetupRequiredHtmlTemplate {
   694→                asset_prefix: &asset_prefix,
   695→            };
   696→            match template.render() {
   697→                Ok(html) => html,
   698→                Err(e) => {
   699→                    warn!(error = %e, "failed to render setup-required template");
   700→                    String::new()
   701→                },
   702→            }
   703→        },
   704→    };
   705→
   706→    // Extract CDN origin from shiki_url for CSP script-src allowlisting.
   707→    let shiki_csp_origin = url::Url::parse(&shiki_url)
   708→        .ok()
   709→        .and_then(|u| u.host_str().map(|host| format!("{}://{host}", u.scheme())));
   710→
   711→    let csp = format!(
   712→        "default-src 'self'; \
   713→         script-src 'self' 'nonce-{nonce}' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'{shiki_origin}; \
   714→         style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; \
   715→         img-src 'self' data: blob:; \
   716→         media-src 'self' blob:; \
   717→         font-src 'self'; \
   718→         connect-src 'self' ws: wss:; \
   719→         frame-ancestors 'none'; \
   720→         form-action 'self'; \
   721→         base-uri 'self'; \
   722→         object-src 'none'",
   723→        shiki_origin = shiki_csp_origin
   724→            .as_deref()
   725→            .map(|o| format!(" {o}"))
   726→            .unwrap_or_default(),
   727→    );
   728→
   729→    let mut response = Html(body).into_response();
   730→    let headers = response.headers_mut();
   731→    if let Ok(val) = "no-cache, no-store".parse() {
   732→        headers.insert(axum::http::header::CACHE_CONTROL, val);
   733→    }
   734→    if let Ok(val) = csp.parse() {
   735→        headers.insert(axum::http::header::CONTENT_SECURITY_POLICY, val);
   736→    }
   737→    response
   738→}

    24→/// Ring buffer for storing metrics history.

    26→pub struct MetricsHistory {
    27→    points: VecDeque<MetricsHistoryPoint>,
    28→    max_points: usize,
    29→}
    30→
    31→#[cfg(feature = "metrics")]
    32→impl MetricsHistory {
    33→    /// Create a new history buffer with the given capacity.
    34→    /// Default: 360 points = 3 hours at 30-second intervals.
    35→    pub fn new(max_points: usize) -> Self {
    36→        Self {
    37→            points: VecDeque::with_capacity(max_points),
    38→            max_points,
    39→        }
    40→    }
    41→
    42→    /// Add a new data point, evicting the oldest if at capacity.
    43→    pub fn push(&mut self, point: MetricsHistoryPoint) {
    44→        if self.points.len() >= self.max_points {
    45→            self.points.pop_front();
    46→        }
    47→        self.points.push_back(point);
    48→    }
    49→
    50→    /// Iterate over all stored points (oldest to newest).
    51→    pub fn iter(&self) -> impl Iterator<Item = &MetricsHistoryPoint> {
    52→        self.points.iter()
    53→    }
    54→
    55→    /// Return the configured maximum capacity.
    56→    pub fn capacity(&self) -> usize {
    57→        self.max_points
    58→    }
    59→}
    60→
    61→#[cfg(feature = "metrics")]
    62→impl Default for MetricsHistory {
    63→    fn default() -> Self {
    64→        Self::new(360) // 3 hours at 30-second intervals
    65→    }
    66→}

   129→impl ConnectedClient {
   130→    pub fn role(&self) -> &str {

   133→
   134→    pub fn scopes(&self) -> Vec<&str> {
   135→        self.connect_params
   136→            .scopes
   137→            .as_ref()
   138→            .map(|s| s.iter().map(|s| s.as_str()).collect())
   139→            .unwrap_or_default()
   140→    }
   141→
   142→    pub fn has_scope(&self, scope: &str) -> bool {
   143→        self.scopes()
   144→            .iter()
   145→            .any(|s| *s == moltis_protocol::scopes::ADMIN || *s == scope)
   146→    }

   148→    /// Check whether this client is subscribed to the given event.
   149→    /// `None` subscriptions = wildcard (receive everything).
   150→    pub fn is_subscribed_to(&self, event: &str) -> bool {
   151→        match &self.subscriptions {
   152→            None => true,
   153→            Some(set) => {
   154→                set.contains(moltis_protocol::subscriptions::WILDCARD) || set.contains(event)
   155→            },
   156→        }
   157→    }

   159→    /// Check whether this client has joined the given channel.

   161→        self.joined_channels.contains(channel)

   164→    /// Send a serialized JSON frame to this client.

   166→    /// Uses `try_send` to avoid blocking; drops the frame if the client's
   167→    /// outbound buffer is full (slow consumer protection).
   168→    pub fn send(&self, frame: &str) -> bool {
